name: agent-pipeline-marketplace
description: Reusable Claude Code plugins: a multi-agent development pipeline and the Stanford STORM research method.

plugins.name: agent-pipeline
plugins.description: Planner -> Coder -> Tester -> Reviewer -> Explainer feature pipeline with a learning stage.

plugins.name: storm-research
plugins.description: Stanford STORM research method: 5 expert perspectives -> contradiction map -> synthesis -> peer review. Turns any topic into a sourced, reliability-scored briefing.
